zh.lifeSummary: 當Baudouin de Guînes於1038年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯i斯時，他的父親Rabel de SAINT-OMER36歲，母親Ghislaine de GAND30歲。他和Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande至少有5個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1094年在他的家鄉享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guînes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Cork and Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Géibheannaigh, ‘son of Géibheannach’, from géibheannach ‘fettered’. See also Keaveny . In counties Kerry and Cork the name may possibly be a corruption of Ó Géibheannaigh.

variants.name: Guinea
meanings: Basque: Castilianized form of Ginea, a habitational name from a place called Ginea, in Araba/Álava province, Basque Country (Spain).

nameMeanings.name: Baudouin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Baudouin de Guînes was born in 1038, in Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Rabel de SAINT-OMER, was 36 and his mother, Ghislaine de GAND, was 30. He had at least 5 sons and 6 daughters with Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande. He died in 1094, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baudouin de Guînes est né en 1038, à Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Rabel de SAINT-OMER, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Ghislaine de GAND, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles avec Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande. Il est décédé en 1094, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baudouin de Guînes 1038 in Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rabel de SAINT-OMER 36 und seine Mutter Ghislaine de GAND 30. Er hatte mit Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1094 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin de Guînes è nato il nel 1038 nel Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Rabel de SAINT-OMER, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Ghislaine de GAND, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie con Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande. Morì nel 1094, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baudouin de Guînesが1038年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスグiンスで生まれた時，父Rabel de SAINT-OMERは36歳，母Ghislaine de GANDは30歳であった。彼はAdèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollandeとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1094年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baudouin de Guînes(이)가 1038년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 구i네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rabel de SAINT-OMER(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Ghislaine de GAND(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1094년 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin de Guînes nasceu em 1038, em Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Rabel de SAINT-OMER, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Ghislaine de GAND, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas com Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande. Ele faleceu em 1094, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baudouin de Guînes родился в 1038 г. в местности гуiнесь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Rabel de SAINT-OMER было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Ghislaine de GAND, 30. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande. Он умер в 1094 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baudouin de Guînes nació en 1038, en Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Rabel de SAINT-OMER, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Ghislaine de GAND, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas con Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande. Murió en 1094, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
